title: Acelen Renovﾃδ｡veis ﾃ｢竄ｬ窶ｹﾃ｢竄ｬ窶ｹBegins Planting Macaﾃδｺba in Cachoeira
content: Since the signing of the Memorandum of Understanding between Acelen Renovﾃδ｡veis ﾃ｢竄ｬ窶ｹﾃ｢竄ｬ窶ｹand the Government of Bahia for the production of renewable fuels, on April 15, 2023, a lot of energy has been used to develop the project in Bahia and Minas Gerais . In these two years, strategic partnerships have been made to leverage research and technologies to materialize the commitment to Brazil's energy transition.  Acelen Renovﾃδ｡veis ﾃ｢竄ｬ窶ｹﾃ｢竄ｬ窶ｹis stepping up its game a bit and starting to plant macauba seedlings for the production of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) and renewable diesel (HVO) in Brazil. The area chosen for the implementation of the first model farm is located in the city of Cachoeira, in the Recﾃδｴncavo Baiano region, called Fazenda Campinas . Approximately 200 hectares of a total of 1,500 hectares to be cultivated in the region will be planted on this property, which will receive more than 800,000 macauba seedlings , transferred from the Mucugﾃδｪ nursery, in Chapada Diamantina, Bahia.
author: Analysts Account
